text:
The End of Evangelion is the soundtrack album of the film The End of Evangelion. https://vgmdb.net/album/19795 It features music composed and conducted by Shirō Sagisu. It also features the ending theme as well as Johann Sebastian Bach's "Air on the G String" and "Herz und Mund und Tat und Leben, BWV 147". It was released by King Records via its label STARCHILD with the catalog number KICA-370, on 26 September 1997 peaking at number 3 on Oricon's albums chart. It was re-released on 22 December 2004. https://vgmdb.net/album/23109 Geneon Entertainment released the album on 11 May 2004 in North America. http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/sound-decision/2004-05-06/2 http://web.archive.org/web/20050221082512/home.comcast.net/~hasshin/cdendeva.html
